name: FileResolutionResponse
summary: User response from request for file resolution

enum_values.name: OK
enum_values.summary: User has supplied an updated file reference

enum_values.name: Cancel
enum_values.summary: User wants to cancel the entire operation

enum_values.name: Ignore
enum_values.summary: User wants to ignore this unresolved file

enum_values.name: IgnoreAll
enum_values.summary: User wants to ignore this and any other unresolved files
